title: Java Garbage Collection Lifecycle
description: A flowchart illustrating the lifecycle of an object in memory and the process by which it becomes eligible for and is reclaimed by the garbage collector.
relationships: Object is created on Heap, reference stored on Stack
Reference is deleted or goes out of scope, making object unreachable
Eligible objects are enqueued for finalization (if finalize() is overridden)
Garbage Collector reclaims memory, freeing the heap space
